gxcr/ipsec.h File Reference

An API for hardware-accelerated IPsec packet processing. More...


Data Structures

struct  gxcr_ipsec_params_t
 Parameters used to set up an IPsec SA. More...
struct  gxcr_ipsec_sa_t
 Data structure that encapsulates a pointer to the memory that is to be used with shim for the metadata, and the information about where the token and the context record fields are within that memory. More...

Functions

void * gxcr_ipsec_sa_key (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns a pointer to the cipher key data for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t, NULL if this gxcr_ipsec_sa_t doesn't do a cipher.
int gxcr_ipsec_sa_key_len (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns the cipher key length for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t, 0 if this gxcr_ipsec_sa_t doesn't do a cipher.
void * gxcr_ipsec_sa_iv (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns a pointer to the initialization vector data for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t, NULL if this gxcr_ipsec_sa_t doesn't do a cipher.
int gxcr_ipsec_sa_iv_len (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns the length of the initialization vector for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t, 0 if this gxcr_ipsec_sa_t doesn't do a cipher.
void * gxcr_ipsec_sa_digest0 (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns a pointer to the calculated digest data for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t, NULL if this gxcr_ipsec_sa_t doesn't do a hash.
int gxcr_ipsec_sa_digest0_len (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns the length of the digest for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t, 0 if this gxcr_ipsec_sa_t doesn't do a hash.
void * gxcr_ipsec_sa_digest1 (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns a pointer to the calculated digest data for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t, NULL if this gxcr_ipsec_sa_t doesn't do a hash.
int gxcr_ipsec_sa_digest1_len (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns the length of the digest for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t, 0 if this gxcr_ipsec_sa_t doesn't do a hash.
void * gxcr_ipsec_sa_spi (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns a pointer to the SPI field for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t.
int gxcr_ipsec_sa_spi_len (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns the length of the SPI field for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t.
void * gxcr_ipsec_sa_seqnum (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns a pointer to the sequence number field for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t.
int gxcr_ipsec_sa_seqnum_len (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns the length of the sequence number field for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t.
void * gxcr_ipsec_sa_seqnum_mask (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns a pointer to the sequence number mask field for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t.
int gxcr_ipsec_sa_seqnum_mask_len (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns the length of the sequence number mask field for a gxcr_ipsec_sa_t.
gxcr_result_token_t * gxcr_ipsec_result (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa)
 Returns a pointer to the result token associated with this IPsec SA.
size_t gxcr_ipsec_calc_sa_bytes (gxcr_ipsec_params_t *ipsec_params)
 Function to find out how much memory to allocate for a particular ipsec_sa.
int gxcr_ipsec_init_sa (gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa, void *metadata_mem, int metadata_mem_len, gxcr_ipsec_params_t *ipsec_params, unsigned char *key, unsigned char *iv)
 Function to initialize an ipsec_sa with cipher/digest algorithms.
size_t gxcr_ipsec_precalc_calc_memory_size (gxcr_ipsec_params_t *ipsec_params, int key_len)
 Function to find out how much MiCA-registered memory to allocate for use by gxcr_ipsec_precalc() for the purpose of performing the precalculation step needed when using HMAC or XCBC digests.
int gxcr_ipsec_precalc (gxio_mica_context_t *mica_context, gxcr_ipsec_sa_t *ipsec_sa, void *scratch_mem, int scratch_mem_len, void *digest_key, int digest_key_len)
 This function uses the MiCA accelerator to perform further initialization of the gxcr_ipsec_sa_t data structure, when either an HMAC or XCBC digest is used.

Detailed Description

An API for hardware-accelerated IPsec packet processing.
